description: A Honey browser extension popup appears over the search form and then disappears.

page_title: Flight Centre | Your centre for travel

description: The browser navigates to the flight search results page.

description: A loading modal appears on the results page with the message 'Our overhead compartments are stuffed with deals!'.
User waits for the flight search results to populate while the loading modal is active, showing various airline logos.
frame_description: Loading screen with rotating airline logos including Qatar Airways and Philippine Airlines.
